title: GVL CLUB CATCH UP | Echuca Bombers FNC
podcast_name: Josh for Breakfast - Triple M Goulburn Valley 95.3
summary: Josh chatted with Belinda Lees the A Grade coach for the netball and Simon Maddox the Seniors coach about their respective seasons so far and club culture. See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: GVL Club Catch Up | Mooroopna Cats FNC: Bittersweet Wins & A Grade Achievements
podcast_name: Josh for Breakfast - Triple M Goulburn Valley 95.3
summary: Josh chatted with Mooroopna Seniors coach, John Lamont about their Goal of the Week last weekend, a big bitter sweet win over Tatura & versing Mansfield this weekend.  He also caught up with Di Hanslow A Grade Netball coach about achievement of her daughter Bree Hanslow of reaching over 400 A Grade games!    See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
